title: Cobblemon Adventure
description: Catch 'em all in Minecraft! A modpack combining the best of Pokémon and Minecraft, with optimized performance and beautiful biomes.

title: Create+
description: A tech-focused modpack centered around the Create mod. Build massive factories, complex automation lines, and trains!

title: Stranded at Sea
description: Survive in the middle of an endless ocean. You'll need to scavenge resources underwater, build a raft, and fight the elements to stay alive.

title: Vanilla+
description: A lightly modded Minecraft experience. Adds performance improvements, quality-of-life features, and subtle visual enhancements while keeping the core vanilla gameplay intact.
